news.t: DoubleLine Opportunistic Core Bond ETF Marks First Three Years
Scott Thomson Joins DoubleLine as Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) Specialist
DoubleLine Announces DoubleLine ETF Platform and Its First Exchange-Traded Funds

overview.description: The DoubleLine Opportunistic Core Bond ETF (DBND) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg U.S. Aggregate Bond index. The fund is an actively managed, fixed income fund comprised of securities from corporate and government issuers, with various credit ratings, and a dollar-weighted average effective portfolio duration of two to eight years. DBND was launched on Mar 31, 2022 and is issued by DoubleLine.

data.title: Scott Thomson Joins DoubleLine as Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) Specialist
data.text: TAMPA, Fla. , March 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Scott Thomson, who previously served as an ETF Capital Markets and Fixed Income Strategist with PIMCO, has joined DoubleLine as an ETF Specialist.
